lineup_source: Predicted Scotland XI for 2026 World Cup (Group C, vs Brazil), 4-3-3: Gordon; Hickey, Hendry, McKenna, Robertson; Ferguson, Christie, McTominay; Gannon-Doak, McGinn; Dykes

players.name: Craig Gordon
players.note: Born in Edinburgh; father David Gordon was a goalkeeper for East of Scotland clubs, mother Heather rarely discussed publicly.

players.name: Aaron Hickey
players.note: Born in Glasgow. No parental origin documented; assumed Scottish (low confidence).

players.name: Jack Hendry
players.note: Born in Glasgow; parents Iain and Karen Hendry run an oak-frame house business in Scotland, no foreign heritage documented.

players.name: Scott McKenna
players.note: Born in Kirriemuir; father Ian played semi-pro football in Scotland. Distantly related to Alan Gilzean via maternal grandmother (too distant to count).

players.name: Andy Robertson
players.note: Born in Glasgow to Brian (raised in Maryhill) and Pauline; Irish descent traces only to a grandmother, so parents counted as Scottish.

players.name: Lewis Ferguson
players.note: Born in Hamilton; son of former Rangers/Scotland midfielder Derek Ferguson and nephew of Barry Ferguson, no foreign heritage documented.

players.name: Ryan Christie
players.note: Born in Inverness; son of former Celtic/Inverness CT midfielder Charlie Christie, no foreign heritage documented.

players.name: Scott McTominay
players.note: Born in Lancaster, England; father Frank born and raised in Glasgow/Helensburgh, Scotland, mother Julie from Morecambe, England — qualifies for Scotland via his father.

players.name: Ben Gannon-Doak
players.note: Born in Dalry, Ayrshire; parents Graham Gannon and Deann Doak, no foreign heritage documented (low confidence, name-based assumption).

players.name: John McGinn
players.note: Born in Glasgow, raised in Clydebank; parents Stephen and Mary McGinn, both Scottish — a family connection to Hungary is via an uncle, not a parent.

players.name: Lyndon Dykes
players.note: Born on the Gold Coast, Australia; both parents are from Dumfriesshire, Scotland (father from Moniaive), per his own account: 'My parents are Scottish.'
